Garden Offices

Compact Office

A focused workspace for smaller gardens.

Request Your Free Quote Enquire Now

Gallery

Compact Office, In Detail

Overview

Compact Office

A compact garden office proving that a dedicated workspace doesn't need a large garden to fit it in.

Living With It

Made for the Way You'll Actually Use It

A focused workspace for smaller gardens. Compact Office is designed around how you'll really spend time in it, not just how it looks from the garden — a space you'll want to use, not just admire.

Every detail, from the layout to the light, is considered with everyday life in mind — because a building you love using is worth so much more than one you simply own.

Key Features

What's Included

Pressure Treated
Made in Britain
Installation Available
Custom Sizes
Sustainable Timber
10 Year Guarantee (placeholder)

Construction

Built to Last

Fully insulated for genuine year-round use, every garden office is built with a contemporary timber frame, weatherproof cladding and large windows to keep the space bright without compromising on privacy or quiet. The result is a workspace that performs like a professional office, not an outbuilding with a desk in it.

Configure Your Building

Available Sizes

Small 3.0m x 2.4m
Medium 4.0m x 2.8m
Large 5.0m x 3.5m

Roof Options

Flat Roof
Pent Roof

Door Options

Single Door

Full-Height Glazing

The Details

Specification

Available Sizes3.0m x 2.4m, 4.0m x 2.8m, 5.0m x 3.5m
Roof OptionsFlat Roof, Pent Roof
CladdingPressure-treated timber, finished to order
Base RequirementLevel concrete or paved base recommended
Guarantee10 Year Guarantee (placeholder)

Frequently Asked Questions

Common Questions About Compact Office

Will I get a good internet connection?

Most customers use a wireless extender or run an ethernet cable during installation — we can advise on the best approach for your garden.

Is it insulated for winter working?

Yes, every garden office is fully insulated as standard, with electric heating available as an optional extra.

Do I need building regulations approval?

Most garden offices don't require building regulations approval, though this depends on size and intended use — we'll guide you through what applies.

Can I fit it out with my own furniture?

Of course — we deliver a finished shell ready for you to fit out exactly as you like.
